description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden bucket with a polygonal, slightly tapered shape and a visible wood grain texture. The bucket is reinforced by two thick, dark metal bands encircling its upper and lower sections, each secured with prominent metal rivets. A sturdy, dark metal bail handle is attached to the sides, allowing for easy carrying and movement. The interior is hollow and open, with no lid or cover, making it suitable for holding liquids or small items. The wood appears well-crafted, with a slightly glossy finish that highlights the grain and gives a sense of durability. The overall design suggests it is intended for practical use in urban or rustic outdoor settings.
description: A polygonal wooden bucket with metal bands and a sturdy bail handle, featuring a visible wood grain and open top. The design is reinforced and practical, suitable for carrying or holding items.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, wood grain, and both metal bands with the handle centered and upright.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the attachment points of the metal handle and the rivets on the bands.
description_view_2: Rear view with the handle mostly hidden, focusing on the uninterrupted wood grain and metal bands.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the handle attachment and rivets, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops on upper and lower sections
